strike.reason: Strike contributes avg 3.13 on profitable trades vs 3.14 on losses (diff=-0.01, source=efficacy) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 0.55 → 0.45 to reduce noise.
strike.discrepancy_note: Efficacy (5-day) suggests 'lower' but actual hold outcomes suggest 'raise'. This typically means the factor is predictive short-term but the hold window is misaligned — check hold_adjustment before changing this factor weight.
